scripts.packages:typecheck: pnpm --filter @ancora/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @ancora/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @ancora/schemas typecheck && pnpm --filter @ancora/config typecheck
scripts.api:lint: cd services/ai-runtime && uv run --project . --group dev ruff check .
scripts.api:test: cd services/ai-runtime && uv run --project . --group dev pytest
scripts.workers:lint: cd services/workers && uv run --project . --group dev ruff check .
scripts.workers:test: cd services/workers && uv run --project . --group dev pytest
scripts.eval:lint: cd tools/eval-runner && uv run --project . --group dev ruff check .
scripts.eval:test: cd tools/eval-runner && uv run --project . --group dev pytest
